title: Training Model Initialization & Weight Loading
activity_flow: Detect distributed type (FSDP plugin config or DeepSpeed plugin config)
Create Accelerator(gradient_accumulation_steps, mixed_precision, log_with, fsdp_plugin, deepspeed_plugin)
DECISION: accelerator.is_main_process? → create output_dir, save config.yaml
BRANCH: deepspeed_plugin is None → return [] (no context)
Determine weight_dtype: fp16 | bf16 based on accelerator.mixed_precision
DECISION: config.lambda_lpips > 0? → create LPIPS(net='vgg'), move to device
DECISION: config.set_transformer_dtype? → module.to(device, dtype=weight_dtype) for all modules
Define unwrap_model(model): accelerator.unwrap_model() + handle compiled module
YES: define save_model_hook (saves transformer + optional ema + optional lora)
YES: define load_model_hook (pops model, loads GSLRMLatent.from_pretrained)
YES: DECISION: distributed_type not FSDP/DEEPSPEED? → register save/load hooks
Configure optimizer params (trainable parameters or lora_params)
NO: transformer, optimizer, lr_scheduler = accelerator.prepare(transformer, optimizer, lr_scheduler)
DECISION: path is None? → log warning, path_ckpt=None (first run)
YES: log 'does not exist', reset resume_from_checkpoint=None, initial_global_step=0
Prepend 'module.' prefix to all state_dict keys
YES: update optimizer param_groups lr, recreate lr_scheduler
DECISION: initial_global_step==0 OR not loaded_accelerator AND config.seed?

key_functions.load_model_weights(path_ckpt, transforme: Loads DeepSpeed-format checkpoint from pytorch_model/mp_rank_00_model_states.pt. Prepends 'module.' prefix to keys. Calls transformer.load_state_dict(strict=False).
key_functions.resume_from_ckpt(config, accelerator, tr: Resolves checkpoint path (explicit, latest, or none). Tries full accelerator.load_state(); falls back to load_model_weights(); on total failure removes broken checkpoint and exits. Returns (initial_global_step, global_step, first_epoch, loaded_accelerator).
key_functions.deepspeed_zero_init_disabled_context_man: Inner function in main(). Returns list with zero3_init_context_manager(enable=False) if DeepSpeed plugin active, else empty list. Used to prevent ZeRO-3 partitioning of VAE during from_pretrained.
key_functions.unwrap_model(model): Inner function in main(). Calls accelerator.unwrap_model() then checks is_compiled_module() to retrieve _orig_mod if compiled with torch.compile.

branching_conditions: config.resume_from_checkpoint_dir is not None: use explicit dir
path_ckpt is None: skip loading, start fresh
accelerator.load_state() success vs Exception: full state vs model-only fallback
load_model_weights() failure: log + optional checkpoint removal + exit(1)
is_latest_resume + path.endswith('bkup'): skip deletion of broken checkpoint
distributed_type == FSDP: advance transformer preparation before optimizer
distributed_type in [FSDP, DEEPSPEED]: skip save/load hook registration
config.resume_pretrained_model_ckpt: load pretrained weights before any resume
config.model_pipeline['use_lora']: add LoRA adapter to transformer
config.set_transformer_dtype: cast all transformer modules to weight_dtype
accelerate version >= 0.16.0: register custom save/load hooks
key_models: vae: load_vae(vae_backbone, vae_path) — frozen, loaded under deepspeed_zero_init_disabled context
distributed_patterns: FSDP: transformer prepared before optimizer; optimizer/lr_scheduler prepared separately
DeepSpeed ZeRO-3: VAE loaded with zero.Init disabled via context manager
Default (DDP): transformer + optimizer + lr_scheduler prepared together
Save/load hooks registered only for non-FSDP/non-DeepSpeed distributed types

return_values.resume_from_ckpt: (initial_global_step: int, global_step: int, first_epoch: int, loaded_accelerator: bool)

important_notes: Pretrained ckpt load (resume_pretrained_model_ckpt) happens before accelerator preparation. Checkpoint resume (resume_from_ckpt) happens AFTER accelerator.prepare(). LoRA adapter added before accelerator prepare. unwrap_model used during checkpoint save hooks to get base model.
